title: suregada ceratophora
intro: Suregada ceratophora, a plant species commonly found in the tropical regions of Asia, is a medicinal plant also known as the "Garden Bitter" due to its bitter leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Suregada ceratophora include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
